name: INSIGHT ENTERPRISES INC
business: Insight Enterprises Inc. sells hardware, software, and services including cloud solutions to clients in North America, Europe, the Middle East and Africa (EMEA), and Asia-Pacific (APAC). The company serves commercial enterprises, public sector organizations, and large corporate customers. As a Fortune 500 Solutions Integrator, it delivers end-to-end digital transformation through a comprehensive portfolio of solutions and partnerships.

exposures.sentence: Our cybersecurity solutions focus on automating and securely connecting modern platforms, including networks, security systems, and automation tools.
Our data and AI solutions focus on turning AI potential into tangible business results.
Our hybrid multicloud solutions are about adopting and building modern platforms from edge to data center to cloud (multicloud and hybrid).
Our digital workplace solutions focus on helping clients navigate workplace changes and meeting employee needs for seamless work experiences.

For example, cloud, security, and digital-related solutions are continuously evolving, and there is rapid development and technological evolution in areas such as IoT, edge-computing, computer vision, advanced machine learning and AI (including Gen AI and agentic AI), automation, augmented reality, blockchain and as-a-service solutions.
We amplify our solutions and services with global scale, local expertise and our e-commerce experience.

tamClaims.claim: worldwide total addressable market for business IT spend is forecasted to exceed $6 trillion by 2029
tamClaims.sentence: The worldwide total addressable market for business IT spend is forecasted to exceed $6 trillion by 2029 according to Gartner, a leading IT research and advisory company.

tamClaims.claim: our addressable market represents approximately $1.3 trillion in 2026
tamClaims.sentence: We believe our addressable market represents approximately $1.3 trillion in 2026.
